about.heading: About Sacred Tao Wisdom
about.subheading: Bridging ancient Taoist traditions with modern seekers worldwide

mission.heading: Our Mission
paragraphs: We preserve and share authentic Taoist teachings from Longhu Mountain.
Every talisman is hand-written with intention, every ritual filmed.
mission.imageAlt: Longhu Mountain Tianshi Mansion - Sacred Taoist altar

items.title: Authentic Lineage
items.desc: Every talisman is hand-written by a Longhu Mountain gaogong priest in a direct lineage of the Tianshi Mansion tradition.

items.title: Full Ceremony Video
items.desc: Before your talisman ships, you receive a complete video recording of your consecration ceremony — proof the ritual was performed.

items.title: Personalized for You
items.desc: Each ritual is performed with your name spoken and your specific intention inscribed into the talisman. No two are ever the same.

practitioner.heading: Meet Our Master
practitioner.subheading: A direct lineage holder of Longhu Mountain tradition.
